layout.expiringSoon: Your access expires in {days} day(s). Subscribe now to keep access.

nav.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?

home.title: Recapo
home.subtitle: Track orders, customers, and payments — all in one place
home.description: Streamline your cross-border social media selling business with our comprehensive order management solution.

landing.heroDescription: Streamline your cross-border social media selling business. Track products, manage orders, and serve customers efficiently—all in one place.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to run your shop
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built specifically for Indonesian cross-border sellers. No bloat—just the tools that matter.
landing.featureOrderManagementDesc: Track and manage orders from creation to delivery. Status updates, notes, and full order history.
landing.featureProductCatalogDesc: Maintain your product inventory with prices, variants, and multi-currency support.
landing.featureCustomerDatabaseDesc: Keep customer info organized. Quick lookup for repeat orders and order history.
landing.featureDashboardReportsDesc: Monthly revenue, order counts, and insights at a glance. Filter by date range.
landing.pricingDescription: Everything you need to manage your orders
landing.screenshotsSubtitle: A clean, intuitive interface built for busy sellers.
landing.screenshotDashboardDesc: Get a bird's-eye view of your monthly performance. Track total orders, revenue, customers, and products—all on one screen with quick-action shortcuts.
landing.screenshotOrdersDesc: Create and manage orders end-to-end. Add products, record partial payments, update delivery status, and export invoices in one click.
landing.screenshotProductsDesc: Maintain your product catalog with photos, prices, and descriptions. Instantly searchable when creating new orders. Share your catalog with a public link—no login required.
landing.screenshotCustomersDesc: Keep a complete customer database with contact details and addresses. Quickly look up any buyer when placing repeat orders.
landing.ctaSignedIn: You're already signed in. Head to your dashboard to manage your orders.
landing.ctaJoin: Join sellers who use Recapo to manage their business.
landing.footer: © Recapo. Track orders, customers, and payments — all in one place.
landing.builtBy: Built by Tiffany · Available for freelance work

auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit verification code.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter the verification code sent to
auth.confirmEmailDescription: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters and contain at least one letter and one number
validation.priceRequired: Price must be greater than or equal to 0

products.title: Products
products.selectProduct: Select a product to view details
products.chooseFromList: Choose from the list on the left
products.deleteConfirmWarning: Any orders that include this product will have their total price recalculated.
products.originalPricePlaceholder: If empty, will be set the same as price

customers.title: Customers
customers.selectCustomer: Select a customer to view details
customers.deleteActiveOrderWarning: This customer has an active order (#{id}). The order will remain after deletion.

orders.title: Orders
orders.chooseFromList: Choose from the list on the left
orders.selectOrder: Select an order to view details
orders.duplicateOrderTitle: Customer already has an active order
orders.duplicateOrderMessage: This customer already has an active order (#{id}). Add your notes to that order (Merge) or cancel.
orders.duplicateOrderMessageInline: This customer already has an active order. Choose a different customer or close and find their order in the list.
orders.exportMessagePlaceholder: e.g. Thank you for your order! Please transfer to BCA 1234567
orders.paymentStatusTooltip: Status updates automatically when payments are added: outstanding → paid. You can also override it manually using Mark Paid or Mark Outstanding.
orders.markPaidConfirmMessage: A payment will be automatically added to cover the remaining balance.
orders.markUnpaidConfirmMessage: All existing payments for this order will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

tempOrders.title: Temp Orders
tempOrders.selectOrder: Select a temp order to view details
tempOrders.fetchDetailsFailed: Failed to fetch temp order details

dashboard.loginRequired: Please log in to access the dashboard.
dashboard.revenueTooltip: Total value of orders in this period
dashboard.saldoTooltip: Total payments received in this period
dashboard.staleOrdersAlert: You have {count} order(s) pending for 3+ days.

share.title: Product Catalog
share.description: Browse and order from this shared product catalog.
share.shopNotFoundDesc: This catalog link may be expired or invalid.
share.noItemsInSummary: Add products to place an order

purchase.title: Purchase List
purchase.description: Products that need to be purchased for active orders
purchase.note: Note: Quantities shown are based on order items from orders with status 'Created' or 'In Progress'.
purchase.empty: No products need to be purchased at this time

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.titlePlaceholder: Briefly describe the issue or idea
feedback.errorMessage: Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.
feedback.successMessage: Thank you for your feedback. We'll review it and kindly ask you to wait for further updates.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Manage your plan and billing.
subscription.manualRenewalBody: Subscriptions are not renewed automatically. You will need to manually make a one-time payment each month to continue using your plan. Auto-renewal is coming soon.
subscription.cancelConfirmBody: Your subscription will be cancelled immediately and you will lose access to all features.

invite.title: Accept Invitation
invite.subtitle: You've been invited to join {shopName}
invite.inviteDescription: Send an invitation email to add a new admin to your shop.
invite.invalidLink: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used.
invite.ownerOnly: Only the shop owner can invite admins.
